TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: lang Seqeciin ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Taybu go (Dawu), kwara sali buwan nya ga 93 buwan, 229 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 97% kyan ku 221 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 3% kyan ku 8 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Paywan 93%, Amis 3%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkraya' na Seqeciin hya' ga Seqalapit. tay mkyahu' na Seqeciin hya' ga Pacavalj. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Seqeciin ga maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Seqeciin ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: laŋ s~ɕeqeʦ~ʨiin ɣa nija mki s~ɕku tajto keŋ atu tajβu ɣo (*awu), kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku * ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, pajwan **%, amis~ɕ *%. rħzjal kkiʔan taj mkrajaʔ na s~ɕeqeʦ~ʨiin ħjaʔ ɣa s~ɕeqalapit. taj mkjaħuʔ na s~ɕeqeʦ~ʨiin ħjaʔ ɣa paʦ~ʨa*alj. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj qalaŋ s~ɕeqeʦ~ʨiin ɣa maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan qalaŋ s~ɕeqeʦ~ʨiin ɣa uŋat pqwas~ɕan βiru. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: lang Seqeciin ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Taybu go (Dawu), kwara sali buwan nya ga 93 buwan, 229 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 97% kyan ku 221 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 3% kyan ku 8 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Paywan 93%, Amis 3%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkraya' na Seqeciin hya' ga Seqalapit. tay mkyahu' na Seqeciin hya' ga Pacavalj. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Seqeciin ga maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Seqeciin ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: laŋ s~ɕeqeʦ~ʨiin ɣa nija mki s~ɕku tajto keŋ atu tajβu ɣo (*awu), kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku * ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, pajwan **%, amis~ɕ *%. rħzjal kkiʔan taj mkrajaʔ na s~ɕeqeʦ~ʨiin ħjaʔ ɣa s~ɕeqalapit. taj mkjaħuʔ na s~ɕeqeʦ~ʨiin ħjaʔ ɣa paʦ~ʨa*alj. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj qalaŋ s~ɕeqeʦ~ʨiin ɣa maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan qalaŋ s~ɕeqeʦ~ʨiin ɣa uŋat pqwas~ɕan βiru. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
